title: Bucket of Nautilus
description: Capture nautiluses in buckets and carry them safely with you
body:
![The player uses buckets of water to scoop up a nautilus, a zombie nautilus, and a coral zombie nautilus, then releases them back into the pond](https://i.ibb.co/v4shwM3K/Bucket-Of-Nautilus-Demo.gif)

___

**Bucket of Nautilus** is a new item and a simple mod that allows you to capture any type of nautilus – regular, zombie, or coral zombie – by right-clicking it with a water bucket.
The captured nautilus is safely stored in your inventory, ready to be released anywhere you like.

This makes it easy to transport nautiluses for building underwater bases, creating aquatic habitats, decorating aquariums, or designing your own ocean world.

___

![An image with three different buckets in the creative inventory: a bucket of nautilus, a bucket of zombie nautilus, a bucket of coral zombie nautilus, and a bucket of baby nautilus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YR6cdu8Z/images/57c1e7d9db7ace77552aae29aa75f00ff8293754.png)

___

![A bucket of nautilus in the inventory with a tooltip: Tools and Utilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YR6cdu8Z/images/82c2f7a3286cccd9307029aab1e651ab3d90210d.png)

___

![All tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YR6cdu8Z/images/a1e9385d090b83be4311b81474817398b20072a2.png)
___

![Six Nautilus buckets showing different tooltip combinations: name, age, saddle, and armor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YR6cdu8Z/images/94fb6a02a82fb6237deeed980eadb7f204704544.png)
